item.title: The High Cost of Low Trust: Our Commitment to Radical Transparency
item.description:
Only 5% of organizations fully trust their cybersecurity providers. Let’s do better.

Categories: Products & Services, Sophos Insights

Tags: Trust, Trust Center, Privacy

item.title: Amazon GuardDuty enhances detection efficacy with Sophos threat intelligence
item.description:
Amazon has integrated Sophos threat intelligence into Amazon GuardDuty, expanding the breadth and accuracy of malicious threat detection for customers running workloads on Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: AWS, Sophos Intelix, amazon, Amazon GuardDuty, Sophos OEM

item.title: Sophos named a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers' Choice for Managed Detection and Response
item.description:
Third consecutive time being named a Customers’ Choice for MDR

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Gartner, Gartner Peer Insights, MDR, Sophos MDR, Third-Party Reviews

item.title: Is compliance complexity outpacing IT capacity?
item.description:
No matter the country, industry, or company size, IT and cybersecurity teams report a heavy regulatory load and worry about staying aligned with requirements

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: CISO, Compliance

item.title: Adobe Reader zero-day vulnerability in active exploitation
item.description:
Categories: Threat Research

Tags: advisory, vulnerability, Adobe Reader

item.title: The vulnerability flood is here. Here’s what it means – and how to prepare
item.description:
We can't control the pace of AI-driven vulnerability discovery, but we can control how fast we respond.

Categories: Sophos Insights

Tags: LLM, AI, Exploit, vulnerability, Active Adversary, Pacific Rim

item.title: We let OpenClaw loose on an internal network. Here’s what it found
item.description:
Following our article on the challenges posed by agentic AI, we gave OpenClaw access to one of our legacy networks

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: OpenClaw, LLM, AI, penetration testing, Red Team, CISO, Sophos X-Ops

item.title: Secure by Design: Building cybersecurity into the foundation
item.description:
An explainer of why this philosophy matters and how it reduces attack surface from the inside

Categories: Sophos Insights, Products & Services

Tags: Secure by Design, Thought Leadership

item.title: QEMU abused to evade detection and enable ransomware delivery
item.description:
The use of hidden virtual machines (VMs) enables long-term access, credential harvesting, data exfiltration, and PayoutsKing ransomware deployment

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: virtual machine, QEMU, PayoutsKing, GOLD ENCOUNTER, CitrixBleed2
